title: Weavster project (v0alpha2)
description: Schema for a Weavster project's weavster.yaml file.

apiVersion.description: Schema version of this project file.

name.description: Project name: lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the project.

pipelines.description: The switchboard: active pipelines and whether each is enabled. `weavster compile` emits a manifest of the enabled set only. Each name resolves to pipelines/<name>.yaml.

enabled.description: Whether compile includes this pipeline. Defaults to true.
